rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GENETTE TRAMMELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Correction Modification Or Withdrawal Of Order
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the order issued on 10/5/18 should be "corrected, modified, or withdrawn" and "the funds held in the Blocked Accounts be distributed to Petitioner [Executor] for the benefit of the Estate, without further requirement." Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME. (Another entire set of of courtesy copies was just received by the examiner as of 8/31/22 when just a proposed order was needed. The estate should not have to bear the cost of another 708-pp petition, most of which pages were not necessary as they were copies of papers previously filed in this proceeding.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RUTHIE MAE BISHOP
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) No conservator of the estate has been appointed for Donald Bishop, one of the beneficiaries alleged to be "permanently and mentally disabled". A copy of the alleged power of attorney naming Donald Bishop's cousin as attorney-in-fact has not been filed. 2) No guardian of the estate has been appointed for Charie Klein, a 16-year-old beneficiary. No ex parte petition has been filed to appoint Matthew Tuller as guardian ad litem. 3) Advance Inheritance, LLC, one of the assignees, filed objections to demand an accounting and immediate sale of the estate real property. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JENNY LEA BROWNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/4/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Conservator must file beginning and ending account statements. [See LRSF 14.34 D.] 2) Please explain why the account begins with $1,017,429.29 when the account must begin with the I&A value. It appears either the account must be amended or a corrected final I&A must be filed. Two I&A's have been filed 7/20/2021 Partial I&A alleges $1,032,078.86 and the Final I&A filed 8/6/2021 alleges $0. 3) It appears 15 days' notice must be re-done. The notice filed 8/12/2022 does not include the required language required under Local Rule 14.1 D. 4) Please file receipts for all requested reimbursements by the Conservator. 5) In order to make or retain investments that do not meet the requirements of Prob. C. 2574(a), the guardian, conservator, or trustee must petition for Court authorization and must petition for renewed authority with each account. The petition must identify the proposed investment(s). The petition must also address all factors identified in Prob. C. 2574(b). Investments that require Court authorization include, but are not limited to, Exchange-Traded Funds, Closed End Funds, and Mutual Funds. [See LRSF 14.47 I. 7)] 6) Please file receipts for entry 02/03/2021 Coventry Place for $25,275.00 including evidence of who paid the disbursement. 7) Please explain entry 3/10/21 Marquis Wilsonville Assisted Living on disbursements for $3,457.70. 8) Please file a receipt for entry 9/16/2021 Caregiver for $12,688.48 on disbursements. 9) Please explain the fraudulent charges under disbursements and provide evidence if they have been reimbursed to the conservatorship. 10) Please explain the entries under life insurance right to receive life insurance and why the assets do not have amounts. 11) Please explain why the attorney is requesting reimbursement for parking when parking is absorbed as part of fees. [See LRSF 14.57 B.] 12) Please explain and provide the legal basis for the soft costs 3% on the attorney invoices. 13) Attorney must provide the required courtesy copies and proposed order to the examiner in room 202. [See LRSF 2.7 and 14.7] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 9/19/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
